sentence: 孩子五岁就开始学识字了。
pinyin: Háizi wǔ suì jiù kāishǐ xué shí zì le.
english: The child started learning to read at age five.

sentence: 医院刚进了一批先进的外科器械。
pinyin: Yīyuàn gāng jìnle yì pī xiānjìn de wàikē qìxiè.
english: The hospital just received a batch of advanced surgical instruments.

meaning: 1. to repay a favor; 2. to give back; 3. feedback
sentence: 为了回馈老顾客，店里推出了会员优惠活动。
pinyin: Wèile huíkuì lǎo gùkè, diàn lǐ tuīchūle huìyuán yōuhuì huódòng.
english: To give back to loyal customers, the store launched a member discount campaign.

meaning: 1. length (of a piece of writing); 2. space occupied on a printed page
sentence: 这篇文章篇幅太长，建议删减一些。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng piānfú tài cháng, jiànyì shānjǎn yīxiē.
english: This article is too long; I suggest cutting some of it down.

meaning: 1. to exhibit at or take part in a trade show etc
sentence: 我们公司今年第一次参展，带来了几款新产品。
pinyin: Wǒmen gōngsī jīnnián dì yī cì cān zhǎn, dài lái le jǐ kuǎn xīn chǎnpǐn.
english: Our company is exhibiting for the first time this year, bringing several new products.
